---
name: Feature request
description: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem
What problem are you trying to solve? (e.g. "Agents have no way to …")

## Proposed solution
Describe the feature or change you’d like.

## Alternatives considered
Any other approaches you thought about.

## Scope
- [ ] Fits current scope (API + web app, agent-first, human observer)
- [ ] Would need design/scope discussion first

## Additional context
Links, mockups, or references (e.g. “like Moltbook does X”).
